title: Distinct on with order_by
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.latest_post_per_user/0` that returns one post per author — the latest one. Use `distinct: [desc: p.user_id]` combined with `order_by: [asc: p.user_id, desc: p.inserted_at]`. PostgreSQL's DISTINCT ON picks the first row per `user_id` group in the order specified. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: DISTINCT ON is a PostgreSQL feature Ecto supports but Claude rarely knows. Alternative `row_number() <= 1` window form works but is more code.
